Thin left-tail - Intraday post (06/Oct)

Window of Risk:

Window of Risk, Disbalance - Investigating the story that the market tells

Weekly post:

Short vanna, short veta, short fly - Weekly post (06-10/Oct)

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The fly pattern is a short fly centered around 6730The net speed profile is negative, significantly right-tail heavy positioning towards 6762.49, while downside is well-supplied.

Centroid is at 6699.54 - 6714.11, this is the most supportive range.

Downside pivot is 6706.25, the center gamma pinning effect mitigates here, and if downside skew is bid, it opens the gate to 6680 (also a local pin), but the market doesn’t price lower for today.

Upside pivot is at 6737.11Here, we can catch a small momentum towards 6750, that is a local pin.If upside vol is realized, we can see 6770, but then reverting back to 6750 and pin there. Otherwise it will pin to 6710.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

The main bet is stickiness around the upperbound of the centroid and the center of the fly, with occassional upside spikesSecondary is a 6750 pin.Only the third one is a quick retest of the downside. Left-tail is very thin.
